text.title: LinkedIn Ads Campaign Strategy Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the artefact produced by ads-linkedin-ads. Validator enforces required keys and per-field constraints; downstream automation refuses to consume outputs that fail the schema.

example.note: Missing audience, bid_strategy, budget.currency, creative_brief fields and kpi fields; empty formats array.

antipattern.description: Plan ships broad targeting with no matched account list.
KPI block only carries cost_per_lead, no cost_per_mql / mql_to_sql.
